MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Patrick Heard.
C. mark Humbert, Esq.. for Plaintiff: Atlas Advertising, a California Corporation.
Plaintiff's witness: Jeff Atlas was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Christopher Caen and Stacey Caen, individually and DBA Foscari Design as follows:
Principal $122,458.54
Prejudgment interest $25,210.51
Attorney fees: $15,755.00
Costs: $1,802.73
for a total of $165,226.78, see scanned document for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
